title: Christina Wald
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Christina Wald''' is an artist. She illustrated several [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Roleplaying game|roleplaying]] books as well as roleplaying books for other series such as ''Shadowrun'' or ''Mechwarrior''.

{{Artist-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
*''[[Instant Adventures]]''
*''[[Stock Ships]]''
*''[[Star Wars Gamemaster Screen, Revised]]''
*''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game, Second Edition, Revised and Expanded]]''
*''[[Tales of the Jedi Companion]]''
*''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
*''[[The Kathol Rift]]''
*[[No Disintegrations (West End Games)|''No Disintegrations'']]
*''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''
*''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''
*''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
*''[[Galladinium's Fantastic Technology]]''
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]
